I Still Believe (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,410,004Details
International Box Office $6,293,747
Worldwide Box Office $16,703,751
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,169,493
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,308,615
Total $8,478,108
Further financial details...

Synopsis

One love can change your life. One life can change the world. From the creators of I Can Only Imagine comes an inspiring love story for the ages.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,103,614 (87.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,250 opening theaters/3,250 max. theaters, 1.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,562,485

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 13th, 2020 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: March 11th, 2020 (Wide) (Egypt)
March 11th, 2020 (Wide) (Philippines)
March 12th, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Jordan)
March 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Bahrain)
Video Release: March 27th, 2020 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2610 (Cert #52526), 12/25/2019)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: I Can Only Imagine
Cast, crew, or production detail: Autobiographical
Plot point: Biography, Cancer, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Romance, Terminal Illness, Widow/Widower
Social setting: Christian Contemporary Music, College
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Erwin Brothers Entertainment, Kingdom Story Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

One love can change your life. One life can change the world. From the creators of I Can Only Imagine comes an inspiring love story for the ages.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,103,614 (87.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,250 opening theaters/3,250 max. theaters, 1.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,562,485

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 13th, 2020 (Wide) by Lionsgate

Running Time: 115 minutes

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
